guidance_coverage.target: 100% of P0-P2 issues show actionable guidance

breakdown.both: 614 issues have BOTH source-cited AND playbook guidance

guidance_coverage.notes: Every P0-P2 issue has at least playbook recommendations. 63% also have source-cited mitigations extracted from advisory pages.

page_enrichment.description: Fetches advisory web pages to get richer text than RSS summaries. Content cached to outputs/page_cache/ for reuse.
page_enrichment.impact: Extraction rate improved from 18% to 63% after page enrichment
page_enrichment.remaining_gap: 37% of P0-P2 issues have no source-cited mitigations. These are primarily: (1) KEV catalog entries linking to pages that only say 'apply vendor mitigations' without specifics, (2) issues from sources that block scraping (403/robots.txt), (3) issues with no usable links.

cross_source_correlation.description: Deterministic CVE matching fills mitigations for issues sharing CVEs with other issues that have them
cross_source_correlation.notes: In this corpus, most CVE-sharing issues already had mitigations after page enrichment

source_cited_mitigations.description: Mitigations explicitly stated by authoritative sources (CISA, vendors), extracted and attributed

ioc_extraction.description: Deterministic IOC extraction (no AI) from all 2056 issues
